fields.description: The DocType this panel displays (one panel per DocType)
fields.label: DocType

fields.description: Float outer frame background (Colours tab). Empty uses theme-bg-surface.
fields.label: Frame Background Class

fields.description: Panel header bar background. Empty uses theme-bg-primary.
fields.label: Header Background Class

fields.description: Panel footer bar background. Empty uses theme-bg-primary.
fields.label: Footer Background Class

fields.description: Table column header cells. Empty uses theme-bg-secondary-600.
fields.label: Column Header Background Class

fields.description: Filter bar container. Empty uses theme-bg-primary-100.
fields.label: Filter Bar Background Class

fields.description: Even table rows. Empty uses theme-bg-surface.
fields.label: Row Background Class

fields.description: Odd (zebra) table rows. Empty uses theme-bg-row-alt.
fields.label: Alternate Row Background Class

fields.description: Viewer Form Dialog header when opened from this panel. Empty uses theme-bg-primary.
fields.label: Dialog Header Background Class

fields.description: Default filters pre-applied when the panel opens. Visible and editable in the filter widget.
fields.label: Default Filters

fields.description: SQL ORDER BY clause, e.g. end_date DESC
fields.label: Order By

fields.description: SQL expressions evaluated at query time (scalar or array). Like FileMaker unstored calculations.
fields.label: Computed Columns

fields.description: Per-column conditional formatting rules (managed by Display tab).
fields.label: Conditional Formatting Rules

fields.description: Comma-delimited visible fields in display order (managed by Display tab)
fields.label: Column Order

fields.description: Comma-delimited fields to render bold (managed by Display tab)
fields.label: Bold Fields

fields.description: Field that holds the gender indicator for each row
fields.label: Gender Column

fields.description: Comma-delimited fields to color based on row gender
fields.label: Gender Color Fields

fields.description: Single root-table field used as the row title (Display tab — root fields only)
fields.label: Title Field

fields.description: Comma-delimited fields that must be filled before Form Dialog save (Display tab). Same key notation as Bold (root fieldname or link_field.fieldname).
fields.label: Required Fields

fields.description: Comma-delimited fields fetched with every panel load for search/filter use but not shown as grid columns (managed by Display tab)
fields.label: Search Fields

fields.description: Show a + button (leftmost in the panel header) that opens the panel's Form Dialog to create a new document. Requires Form Dialog to be linked on this Page Panel. Not used on the root WP Tables panel.
fields.label: Allow New Record Creation

fields.description: Field containing the email address for recipients
fields.label: Email Field

fields.description: Field containing the phone number for SMS recipients
fields.label: SMS Field

fields.description: Show per-row button to open WordPress logged in as the family user
fields.label: Show WP Switch

fields.description: Fieldname on each row that holds the Families.ID value (e.g. id on Families, or the Link field to Families on People)
fields.label: WP Family ID Field

fields.description: Show Email button on each tile in the listing
fields.label: Show Tile Email

fields.description: Show SMS button on each tile in the listing
fields.label: Show Tile SMS

fields.description: V2 only: when user clicks a row (except WP Tables), open the form view of that record in a new browser tab
fields.label: Open Card on Click

fields.description: Auto-generated SQL query used to fetch this panel's data. Rebuilt automatically on Save from Display settings, or click Refresh SQL on the Query tab. Read-only — for inspection and troubleshooting.
fields.label: Panel SQL

fields.description: Which frozen Form Dialog opens for this panel in V2.
fields.label: Form Dialog
